@@ -28,0 +28,2 @@

+                 "testAddMin"})
@@ -93,0 +96,1 @@
+        Asserts.assertEQ(a + Integer.MIN_VALUE          , testAddMin(a));
@@ -314,0 +318,8 @@
+
+    @Test
+    @IR(counts = {ADD_I, "1"})
+    @IR(applyIfPlatform = {"aarch64", "true"}, counts = {AARCH64_ADD_I_REG_MIN, "1"})
+    // Checks x + MIN_VALUE is matched by addI_reg_min on AArch64
+    public int testAddMin(int x) {
+        return x + Integer.MIN_VALUE;
+    }

@@ -28,0 +28,2 @@
+import static compiler.lib.ir_framework.IRNode.*;
+
@@ -30,1 +32,1 @@
- * @bug 8267265

@@ -48,1 +50,1 @@
-                 "test23", "test24"})
+                 "test23", "test24", "testAddMin"})
@@ -92,0 +94,1 @@
+        Asserts.assertEQ(a + Long.MIN_VALUE             , testAddMin(a));
@@ -309,0 +312,8 @@
+
+    @Test
+    @IR(counts = {ADD_L, "1"})
+    @IR(applyIfPlatform = {"aarch64", "true"}, counts = {AARCH64_ADD_L_REG_MIN, "1"})
+    // Checks x + MIN_VALUE is matched by addL_reg_min on AArch64
+    public long testAddMin(long x) {
+        return x + Long.MIN_VALUE;
+    }

@@ -249,0 +251,8 @@
+    @Test
+    @IR(failOn = {IRNode.XOR_I})
+    @IR(counts = {IRNode.ADD_I, "1"})
+    // Checks x ^ MIN_VALUE => x + MIN_VALUE
+    public int testXorMin(int x) {
+        return x ^ MIN_VALUE;
+    }

@@ -34,1 +34,1 @@

+    @Test
+    @IR(failOn = {IRNode.XOR_L})
+    @IR(counts = {IRNode.ADD_L, "1"})
+    // Checks x ^ MIN_VALUE => x + MIN_VALUE
+    public long testXorMin(long x) {

+    }
